GRETIL has only Varadarāja's Laghu-Siddhānta-Kaumudī (fetched: gretil_varadaraja_laghusiddhantakaumudi). The full Bhaṭṭoji Siddhānta-Kaumudī is on archive.org as Nirṇaya-Sāgara / Anandāśrama scans. Fetch when engaged.

Remaining ~68 KSTS volumes (out of 75) are on archive.org/egangotri. Lane 5 fetched 7 engaged ones (Tantrāloka, Paramārtha-Sāra, Tantrasāra, IPV pt.1+2, Pratyabhijñā-Hṛdaya, Śiva-Sūtra-Vimarśinī). Pull more only when specific works become engaged. See data/external/muktabodha_via_egangotri/.
